# Load the text file
path = '/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]

path = '/mnt/data/file-NvLHuBhC9Kho4ncjvhUhGX-Q102.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)

# Find indices of double quotes
indices = [i for i,c in enumerate(text) if c == '\"']
len(indices), indices[:20]

spans = []
for i in range(0, len(indices)-1, 2):
    start = indices[i]+1
    end = indices[i+1]
    spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
# handle last unmatched
if len(indices) % 2 == 1:
    start = indices[-1]+1
    end = len(text)
    spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
len(spans), spans[0][2]

for i,(s,e,seg) in enumerate(spans):
    print(i, s, e, seg)

# Define the spans captured earlier
spans = [
(288, 436, 'وَمَن أَظلَمُ مِمَّن كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَسَكَتَ عَن سُقوطِهَا إِن مَّسَّهُ الْهُدَى وَصَدَّ عَنْهُ سَبِيلَهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُضِلُّ مَن يَشَاءُ'),
(597, 836, 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُم مَنْ قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُم مَنْ لَمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ أَسْمَاعًا وَأَعْيُنًا وَقُلُوبًا لَعَلَّهُمْ يَصْطَفُونَ وَمَا كُنَّا مُعَذِّبِينَ حَتَّى نَبْعَثَ رَسُولًا'),
(988, 1195, 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى عَادٍ وَثَمُودَ وَجِتُّ وَيُّ وَتُغْمَا وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَعَادٌ وَثَمُودُ وَأَكثَرُ مِن قَرْيَةٍ جَاوَزْنَاهَا وَمَا كَانَ عَهْدُ النَبِيِّينَ عِندَنَا بِغُلَطٍ'),
(1346, 1434, 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِمْ فَزادَهُمْ عُضَالًا وَجَزَعًا'),
(1585, 1715, 'وَمَن يُشَاوِرْكُمُ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا فَسَوْفَ يَرُدُّكُمْ إِلَى الْقِيَامَةِ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ'),
(1866, 1954, 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِمْ فَزادَهُمْ عُضَالًا وَجَزَعًا'),
(2105, 2125, 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا')
]

# Canonical from file_search for Ghafir 78
canon_40_78 = 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ لَمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ ۗ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ بِآيَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ ۚ فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ قُضِيَ بِالْحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ الْمُبْطِلُونَ'
# Compare with the user's second span (index 1) correction
match = canon_40_78 == canon_40_78  # trivially True; we just ensure encoding
match

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
